Ibn Haldun's Works Continue to Meet Readers

11.10.2022

Ibn Haldun's works continue to be published.

Ibn Haldun's works continue to be published by our University. In this context, the author's treatise, which is known as Şifâʾü's-sâʾil li-tehzîbi'l-mesâʾil, met with readers from Ibn Haldun University Press with the title "The Way of Sufism: Concerning the Necessity of the Sheikh in Fighting and Fighting".

The work can be obtained from selected bookstores and online book sales websites.
